1145.content:
Fictional Faceoff

Basically an interactive version of Deadliest Warrior and Death Battle, where fictional characters from all media fight to the finish!
1145.title: Fictional Faceoff

11451.content:
Welcome one and all to the Battlegrounds! Here, your favorite fictional characters from across the multiverse will battle for supremacy! Here's how it works, Select a battle, then give an overview of the participants. Their backstory, weapons and abilities, etc. Then make the actual fight a separate chapter. Have fun!

Now, who shall battle whom?
11451.title: The Battlegrounds

12.content: So a combination of genres then? How about these?
12.title: A Mix of Different Genres

13.content: So you have some specific tastes? No problem, how about these?
13.title: Something More Niche

132.content:
The Paragon Prince

I’m a big fan of the cartoon “Samurai Jack”. The basic premise is what inspired me to make this story, with a few of my own personal touches. This will be an episodic interactive, where after the first chapter, you will select a season, so to speak, and then an episode that tells a story of one of the main character's adventures.

Okay, now the backstory…

In ages past, humanity and the world were ruled by countless species of monsters, who treated humans as nothing more than slaves and food. Each of these monsters was descended from the most vile of all their kind, Echidna, who had spawned the first of each race of monster from her womb. The monsters worshipped Echidna as their creator and ruler, and spread her dominion across the entire globe. For five hundred years, Echidna and her children subjugated and ravaged all humankind, until the discovery of silver. Be it some sort of divine intervention or just plain luck, silver was found to have an adverse effect on all species of monster, causing them immense pain at the mere touch of it.

Finally possessing the means to fight back, a human uprising began. Armed with shining silver blades, humanity systematically slaughtered Echidna's children, until only the mother of monsters herself was left. In the ensuing battle, Echidna was grievously weakened and wounded. But before she could be slain, she sealed herself inside an impenetrable obsidian orb, vowing to return and real vengeance on humanity and ruling the earth once again.

It has been several centuries since that day. Humans have thrived and flourished across the world, and the age of Echidna has faded from memory to the realm of myths and legends. It is here that our story truly begins, as a young prince and direct descendant of the heroes who defeated Echidna, kneels at his father's bedside. The king is deathly ill, and knows his end is nearing. But he does not fear what is coming, because he knows his son will carry on in his place, having raised him to be a just and virtuous ruler.

But deep within the depths of the earth, in a long sealed and forgotten chamber, an obsidian egg begins to crack, as a what lays inside starts to stir from it’s long sleep. Echidna is about to return, whole and at full strength once again, hungry for revenge.

Rules

1. Please try to be as detailed as you can. No really short additions, unless you’re just giving more options for future episodes.

2. Please keep the content of each chapter within the story rating. Although, I may change this if need be.

3. As with Samurai Jack, the main character is not to be named, being referred to only as The Prince.
132.title: The Paragon Prince

1322.content:
Agents of A.C.E.

Sort of an interactive anime.

On the world of Theros, humans and monsters have been at constant battle with each other since the beginning of time. Thousands of years ago, an order of warriors was formed to combat the monster menace and protect humanity. Over the centuries, that order became the organization known as ACE.

Abnormal
Creature
Extermination

While the exact origins of ACE are largely unknown, it's operatives have never forgotten it's purpose. Today, they use a combination of science and ancient magics to seek out and destroy monsters wherever they may threaten human life. But this is easier said than done, as monsters have developed the ability to shapeshift into human form, allowing them to blend in amongst their prey. But the Agents of ACE have always risen to the challenge, and will continue to do so until every last monster has been eradicated. Only then, will their mission be done.

In ages past, potential recruits had to undergo rigorous training and conditioning in order to unlock their Potential and prepare them for their new life. Until a special brew was discovered, which would alter the drinker's body and imbue then with the needed abilities. The downside to this being that this potion also had a chance of killing whoever drinks it. The standard equipment of an Agent consists of a black suit, red tie and reflective lense glasses. Their primary weapon is sword that every agent keep at their side at all times, which resembles a katana with a silver infused blade with a sort of laser edge for cutting through even the strongest materials like dragon hide.

In addition to the above, all agents posess the following abilities:

Enhanced strength, speed and durability
Telekinesis
Conjuring fire, ice or lighting
Energy shield

The world of Teros is basically one giant futuristic city, with such technology as flying vehicles, advanced medicine, holograms, etc. Our main characters are Agents Bryce and Tali, partners that have been on numerous missions together and slain countless monsters. They have a friendly competition between the two of them, to see who can score the most kills before they retire. While the two of them greatly respect the other's abilities and combat skills, they are not romantically interested in each other.

Rules

1. I will allow violence and blood, just don't be too extreme with it.

2. No super short chapters. If you're going to add, please make it at least a couple paragraphs long.

3. I may alter or add rules as I feel is necessary.

Have fun! Hope you enjoy!
1322.title: Agents of A.C.E.

info.brief_description: Can't post a interactive in your portfolio? Share it here instead!
info.description:
Have you reached the limit of Interactive stories your portfolio can hold? Not a problem! Simply add it to our collection for all to enjoy! Just make sure it's listed under the right section. I'll allow most any genre, but if you're not sure, just ask me if you can add something before posting. I will be adding stories of my own as well, so be sure to spread the word of this item to your friends!

Guidelines

Simply match your story idea to one of the available genres, or add another unlisted genre yourself. Then give an intro and overview to your interactive idea, then leave the options to either begin your story, or to move on to another one. If you would like to list more options after adding to a storyline, contact me and I will fill them in for you if you can't yourself. When adding a new story, be sure to make the title of that addition the same as your story's title, so that it is easier to locate in the outline.

Go wild and enjoy!
